caption: A man with glasses and a mustache is speaking, appearing from the chest up against a vibrant, abstract blue and purple backdrop with glowing elements. He is wearing a light blue button-down shirt underneath a dark grey blazer. In each frame, he remains in a centered position, maintaining a similar posture while speaking, with slight variations in his facial expression and the movement of his mouth. A logo featuring a stylized gear and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the screen throughout the sequence. The setting appears to be a studio environment designed for educational or professional presentations, with the background remaining static while the man provides a lecture or presentation.
